mapper.select: SELECT TM_ID, FAN_LOYALTY, FAN_SATISFACTION, EXPECTATION_LEVEL, PERFORMANCE_SENSITIVITY, REBUILD_PATIENCE, STAR_PLAYER_PREFERENCE, FRANCHISE_PLAYER_ATTACHMENT, PROSPECT_PREFERENCE, VETERAN_PREFERENCE, FOREIGN_PLAYER_EXPECTATION, LOCAL_IDENTITY, TRADITION_PREFERENCE, SUPPORT_INTENSITY, RIVALRY_INTENSITY, ATTENDANCE_POWER, MERCHANDISE_AFFINITY, TICKET_PRICE_SENSITIVITY, SEASON_TICKET_LOYALTY, AWAY_FAN_POWER, MEDIA_AMPLIFICATION, CRITICISM_TENDENCY, PATIENCE, EMOTIONAL_VOLATILITY, OFFENSE_PREFERENCE, PITCHING_PREFERENCE, DEFENSE_PREFERENCE, AGGRESSIVE_MANAGEMENT_PREFERENCE, CURRENT_POPULARITY, AVERAGE_ATTENDANCE, SEASON_TICKET_HOLDERS, FAN_DISCONTENT, DEMAND_LEVEL FROM TM_FAN_PRPNST WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId}

SELECT TM_ID, FAN_LOYALTY, FAN_SATISFACTION, EXPECTATION_LEVEL, PERFORMANCE_SENSITIVITY, REBUILD_PATIENCE, STAR_PLAYER_PREFERENCE, FRANCHISE_PLAYER_ATTACHMENT, PROSPECT_PREFERENCE, VETERAN_PREFERENCE, FOREIGN_PLAYER_EXPECTATION, LOCAL_IDENTITY, TRADITION_PREFERENCE, SUPPORT_INTENSITY, RIVALRY_INTENSITY, ATTENDANCE_POWER, MERCHANDISE_AFFINITY, TICKET_PRICE_SENSITIVITY, SEASON_TICKET_LOYALTY, AWAY_FAN_POWER, MEDIA_AMPLIFICATION, CRITICISM_TENDENCY, PATIENCE, EMOTIONAL_VOLATILITY, OFFENSE_PREFERENCE, PITCHING_PREFERENCE, DEFENSE_PREFERENCE, AGGRESSIVE_MANAGEMENT_PREFERENCE, CURRENT_POPULARITY, AVERAGE_ATTENDANCE, SEASON_TICKET_HOLDERS, FAN_DISCONTENT, DEMAND_LEVEL FROM TM_FAN_PRPNST ORDER BY TM_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TM_FAN_PRPNST ( TM_ID, FAN_LOYALTY, FAN_SATISFACTION, EXPECTATION_LEVEL, PERFORMANCE_SENSITIVITY, REBUILD_PATIENCE, STAR_PLAYER_PREFERENCE, FRANCHISE_PLAYER_ATTACHMENT, PROSPECT_PREFERENCE, VETERAN_PREFERENCE, FOREIGN_PLAYER_EXPECTATION, LOCAL_IDENTITY, TRADITION_PREFERENCE, SUPPORT_INTENSITY, RIVALRY_INTENSITY, ATTENDANCE_POWER, MERCHANDISE_AFFINITY, TICKET_PRICE_SENSITIVITY, SEASON_TICKET_LOYALTY, AWAY_FAN_POWER, MEDIA_AMPLIFICATION, CRITICISM_TENDENCY, PATIENCE, EMOTIONAL_VOLATILITY, OFFENSE_PREFERENCE, PITCHING_PREFERENCE, DEFENSE_PREFERENCE, AGGRESSIVE_MANAGEMENT_PREFERENCE, CURRENT_POPULARITY, AVERAGE_ATTENDANCE, SEASON_TICKET_HOLDERS, FAN_DISCONTENT, DEMAND_LEVEL ) VALUES ( #{tmId}, #{req.fanLoyalty}, #{req.fanSatisfaction}, #{req.expectationLevel}, #{req.performanceSensitivity}, #{req.rebuildPatience}, #{req.starPlayerPreference}, #{req.franchisePlayerAttachment}, #{req.prospectPreference}, #{req.veteranPreference}, #{req.foreignPlayerExpectation}, #{req.localIdentity}, #{req.traditionPreference}, #{req.supportIntensity}, #{req.rivalryIntensity}, #{req.attendancePower}, #{req.merchandiseAffinity}, #{req.ticketPriceSensitivity}, #{req.seasonTicketLoyalty}, #{req.awayFanPower}, #{req.mediaAmplification}, #{req.criticismTendency}, #{req.patience}, #{req.emotionalVolatility}, #{req.offensePreference}, #{req.pitchingPreference}, #{req.defensePreference}, #{req.aggressiveManagementPreference}, #{req.currentPopularity}, #{req.averageAttendance}, #{req.seasonTicketHolders}, #{req.fanDiscontent}, #{req.demandLevel} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FAN_LOYALTY = #{req.fanLoyalty}, FAN_SATISFACTION = #{req.fanSatisfaction}, EXPECTATION_LEVEL = #{req.expectationLevel}, PERFORMANCE_SENSITIVITY = #{req.performanceSensitivity}, REBUILD_PATIENCE = #{req.rebuildPatience}, STAR_PLAYER_PREFERENCE = #{req.starPlayerPreference}, FRANCHISE_PLAYER_ATTACHMENT = #{req.franchisePlayerAttachment}, PROSPECT_PREFERENCE = #{req.prospectPreference}, VETERAN_PREFERENCE = #{req.veteranPreference}, FOREIGN_PLAYER_EXPECTATION = #{req.foreignPlayerExpectation}, LOCAL_IDENTITY = #{req.localIdentity}, TRADITION_PREFERENCE = #{req.traditionPreference}, SUPPORT_INTENSITY = #{req.supportIntensity}, RIVALRY_INTENSITY = #{req.rivalryIntensity}, ATTENDANCE_POWER = #{req.attendancePower}, MERCHANDISE_AFFINITY = #{req.merchandiseAffinity}, TICKET_PRICE_SENSITIVITY = #{req.ticketPriceSensitivity}, SEASON_TICKET_LOYALTY = #{req.seasonTicketLoyalty}, AWAY_FAN_POWER = #{req.awayFanPower}, MEDIA_AMPLIFICATION = #{req.mediaAmplification}, CRITICISM_TENDENCY = #{req.criticismTendency}, PATIENCE = #{req.patience}, EMOTIONAL_VOLATILITY = #{req.emotionalVolatility}, OFFENSE_PREFERENCE = #{req.offensePreference}, PITCHING_PREFERENCE = #{req.pitchingPreference}, DEFENSE_PREFERENCE = #{req.defensePreference}, AGGRESSIVE_MANAGEMENT_PREFERENCE = #{req.aggressiveManagementPreference}, CURRENT_POPULARITY = #{req.currentPopularity}, AVERAGE_ATTENDANCE = #{req.averageAttendance}, SEASON_TICKET_HOLDERS = #{req.seasonTicketHolders}, FAN_DISCONTENT = #{req.fanDiscontent}, DEMAND_LEVEL = #{req.demandLevel}
